positive: A minimalist geometric celestial map featuring stylized constellations and nebulae patterns. The main subject is a stylized crescent moon cradling abstract glowing planetary orbits. The design uses a limited palette of deep indigo, cosmic teal, luminous gold, and matte black, creating strong contrast against a central white or light beige background. The style should be modern, clean line-art mixed with abstract, ethereal graphic elements, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Composition must be perfectly centered and scalable, with crisp, defined edges and clear silhouettes. Incorporate subtle, repeating patterns of dots and starbursts for texture, but keep the core elements highly legible and clean.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, watercolor, dirty, distressed, logos, text, watermark, signature, blurry, artifact, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, cluttered, busy
